business.name: ClearView Landscaping, LLC
business.tagline: Where your yard vision becomes reality

hero.headline: The crew *Wilmington trusts* with their yard
hero.subheadline: Five stars across 96 reviews. Same-day starts after deposit. That's how we've built our reputation.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From patios to full yard makeovers
services_section.subheading: Every project handled with care, completed clean and efficient

services.title: Landscape Design & Installation
services.description: Complete front and back yard renovations. We design it, you approve it, we install it in one day.

services.title: Patio & Hardscape
services.description: Stone patios, walkways, and outdoor living spaces that last. Ask our repeat customers about the difference.

services.title: Yard Renovation
services.description: Transform tired spaces into something you'll actually want to spend time in. No damage to existing features.

services.title: Ongoing Landscape Care
services.description: Keep your investment looking its best. Regular maintenance from the same crew who installed it.

about.heading: Built on Wilmington relationships
about.body: What started as quality work has grown into something more — customers who call us back, neighbors who recommend us, and a team that treats every yard like it's their own. Tamara handles your questions, Alexis designs your space, and our crew makes it happen. Clean, efficient, and done right the first time.

reviews.name: Kate S.
reviews.text: 1,000,000 out of 10! From the moment I reached out, their responsiveness was exceptional. Tamara and the team delivered exactly what they promised.

reviews.name: Mark T.
reviews.text: Second time hiring them. Patio last year was fantastic, front yard renovation this year. All work completed in one day, clean and efficient.

reviews.name: Danielle P.
reviews.text: Work exceeded our expectations. Process was smooth and they completed everything the day after we paid our deposit. Alexis was kind and professional.

reviews.name: Jordan N.
reviews.text: Excellent crew that's quick, efficient, and handles jobs with care. They've done several projects for us and there will definitely be more to come.

cta.heading: Ready to transform your yard?
cta.body: Join 96 five-star customers who trusted us with their outdoor space. Quick quotes, next-day starts, and work that exceeds expectations.
